mapper.sql: id, trace_id, session_id, agent_type, task_type, task_desc, status, total_tokens, total_duration_ms, files_changed, loop_count, quality_score, revision_count, started_at, completed_at, created_stime, modified_stime, is_del
mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN loop_count = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) FROM metrics_agent_traces WHERE DATE(started_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND status = 'completed' AND is_del = 0

SELECT task_type AS taskType, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(total_tokens) AS totalTokens, AVG(total_tokens) AS avgTokens FROM metrics_agent_traces WHERE DATE(started_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND is_del = 0 GROUP BY task_type ORDER BY totalTokens DESC

SELECT agent_type AS agentType, COUNT(*) AS taskCount, SUM(total_tokens) AS totalTokens FROM metrics_agent_traces WHERE DATE(started_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND is_del = 0 GROUP BY agent_type ORDER BY taskCount DESC

SELECT DATE(started_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed FROM metrics_agent_traces WHERE DATE(started_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND is_del = 0 GROUP BY date ORDER BY date
